tool_args.label: Congestion Relief Zone
tool_args.raw_text: Congestion Relief Zone SOUTH OF 61 St. Vehicles will be charged upon entry to the Congestion Relief Zone. Northern boundary generally has detection points between 60th Street and 61st Street.

payload.description: Congestion Relief Zone (CRZ) toll zone in Manhattan CBD where vehicles are charged upon entry. Northern boundary between 60th and 61st Streets.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Vehicles will be charged upon entry to the Congestion Relief Zone
Northern boundary generally has detection points between 60 th Street and 61 st Street
TOLL Congestion Relief Zone SOUTH OF 61 St

tool_args.label: Roadway Toll System Detection Points - Congestion Relief Zone
tool_args.raw_text: Located at entrances, exits, and along excluded roadways. Uses existing infrastructure where possible. Similar to existing infrastructure and signage present along the roadways throughout the Manhattan CBD. Infrared illumination so no light pollution at night.

payload.description: Roadway toll system detection points at entrances, exits, and along excluded roadways of the Congestion Relief Zone. Uses existing infrastructure where possible with infrared illumination.
payload.location_text: Manhattan CBD, northern boundary between 60th and 61st Streets

normalized_location.raw_text: Manhattan CBD, northern boundary between 60th and 61st Streets

evidence_refs.source_quote: Located at entrances, exits, and along excluded roadways

Uses existing infrastructure where possible. Similar to existing infrastructure and signage present along the roadways throughout the Manhattan CBD. Infrared illumination so no light pollution at night

tool_args.label: E-ZPass and Tolls-by-Mail Payment System
tool_args.raw_text: E-ZPass and Tolls-by-Mail, with potential for future technologies. Prices will be determined by time of day, vehicle type, and which payment method is used. Any discounts, credits or exemptions will require the use of E-ZPass.

payload.description: E-ZPass and Tolls-by-Mail payment methods for Congestion Relief Zone, with potential for future technologies. Discounts/credits/exemptions require E-ZPass.

evidence_refs.source_quote: E-ZPass and Tolls-by-Mail, with potential for future technologies. Prices will be determined by time of day, vehicle type, and which payment method is used. Any discounts, credits or exemptions will require the use of E-ZPass

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: Back Office System for CBD Tolling
tool_args.raw_text: Back Office will provide account management services for E-ZPass and Tolls-by-Mail customers, plan management for those with discount or exemption plans, and customer service functions. Consistency in customer experience – using same regional customer service center and back office as the other NY agencies. CBD will be added to existing statements and toll bills. Testing Back Office system with other regional tolling agencies from the E-ZPass group.

payload.description: Account management services for E-ZPass and Tolls-by-Mail customers, plan management, customer service functions. Uses same regional customer service center as other NY agencies. CBD added to existing statements and toll bills.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Back Office will provide account management services for E-ZPass and Tolls-by-Mail customers, plan management for those with discount or exemption plans, and customer service functions

Consistency in customer experience – using same regional customer service center and back office as the other NY agencies. CBD will be added to existing statements and toll bills. Back Office staff trained to assist customers with specific CBD questions, including those related to discount and exemption plans. Testing Back Office system with other regional tolling agencies from the E-ZPass group

tool_args.label: Advanced Image Vehicle Classification
tool_args.raw_text: Simplified number of vehicle classes. Advanced image technology so traditional roadside sensors with in-ground loops not needed. Classification based on vehicle characteristics (e.g. shapes, patterns) associated with distinct types of vehicles.

payload.description: Advanced image technology for vehicle classification based on shapes/patterns. Simplifies vehicle classes and eliminates need for traditional roadside sensors with in-ground loops.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Simplified number of vehicle classes. Advanced image technology so traditional roadside sensors with in-ground loops not needed. Classification based on vehicle characteristics (e.g. shapes, patterns) associated with distinct types of vehicles

payload.claim_text: Enforcement for occupied vehicles: Stops by observation and Summons for NYS Vehicle & Traffic Law. Applicable to all vehicles regardless of state of registration.
payload.subject: Congestion Relief Zone enforcement

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Stops by observation • Summons for NYS Vehicle & Traffic Law
Applicable to all vehicles regardless of state of registration

payload.claim_text: Enforcement for unoccupied/parked vehicles: Summons for NYC Parking Rules.
payload.subject: Congestion Relief Zone enforcement

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Summons for NYC Parking Rules

payload.claim_text: Adds 'Theft of Services' for toll violations. Allows arrests for use of mechanical or electronic devices for purposes of obstructing a plate.
payload.subject: Congestion Relief Zone enforcement legislation

evidence_refs.source_quote: Adds "Theft of Services" for toll violations
• Allows arrests for use of "mechanical or electronic devices" for purposes of obstructing a plate

payload.claim_text: Increased fines for covered and obstructed plates. Fine increase to $100-$500. Seizure of plate covering with $250 fine.
payload.subject: Congestion Relief Zone enforcement legislation

evidence_refs.source_quote: Increased fines for covered and obstructed plates
• Fine increase to $100-$500 • Seizure of plate covering with $250 fine

payload.claim_text: Monitoring and reporting includes traffic congestion in and around the CBD. Types of vehicles and volumes, including vehicle-miles traveled (VMT) within the CBD and vehicles entering the CBD. Taxi/FHV use, including trips and VMT within the CBD.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Monitoring and Reporting
Traffic congestion in and around the CBD
• Types of vehicles and volumes, including vehicle-miles traveled (VMT) within the CBD and vehicles entering the CBD • Taxi/FHV use, including trips and VMT within the CBD

payload.claim_text: Monitoring and reporting includes transit (ridership, average bus speeds within the CBD) and air quality (pollutant loads including PM2.5, Nitrogen Dioxide, and Ozone, and Greenhouse Gas emissions).

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Ridership • Average bus speeds within the CBD
• Pollutant loads including PM2.5, Nitrogen Dioxide, and Ozone • Greenhouse Gas emissions

payload.claim_text: Mitigation Commitments: Pedestrian counts at transit station elements, before/after go-live. Traffic counts at highways and intersections. Implementation of EJ place-based and regional mitigation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Mitigation Commitments
• Pedestrian counts at transit station elements, before/after go-live • Traffic counts at highways and intersections • Implementation of EJ place-based and regional mitigation

payload.claim_text: Signage for the Congestion Relief Zone includes renderings along Fifth Avenue with signs such as 'LAST TURN BEFORE TOLL', 'BEGIN TOLL ZONE', 'END TOLL ZONE', 'TOLL Congestion Relief Zone ENTRANCE', 'Congestion Relief Zone CAR TOLL E-ZPass $00.00 TOLLS BY MAIL HIGHER RATE', and 'TOLL Congestion Relief Zone SOUTH OF 61 St'.
